content: Phase 1: POC - WebSocket hub + event pipeline tested in isolation (14/14 PASS)
Phase 2: Design guidelines via design_agent (SCADA/HMI dark theme)
Phase 2: Backend - full data model, Appendix A seed (194 machines), auth/RBAC, all modules, timeline+notifications
Phase 2: Frontend - Control Room Digital Twin, Machine Drawer (11 tabs), all 9 module pages
Phase 3: Reliability/AWS engine (MTBF L1-L3, Weibull), Predictive engine, Analytics multi-level
Phase 4: Spares Inventory (SAP-centric, ledger, CSV import), Administration module, seeded spares
E2E testing via testing_agent_v3 (backend 98.7%, frontend 100%) - minor 404 issue fixed and verified
